question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_1 WHERE pk_1 NOT IN (SELECT T2.fk_1 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.pk_1 = T3.fk_1 WHERE T3.num_1 = 225 AND T2.text_1 = 'sunk')
raw_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_1 WHERE pk_1 NOT IN (SELECT T2.fk_1 FROM table_2 AS T2 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.pk_1 = T3.fk_1 WHERE T3.num_1 = 225 AND T2.text_1 = 'sunk')
